pattern: Comparing the array against its own sorted copy counts how many positions are already out of non-decreasing order.
hints: What does the line look like when everyone is correctly ordered? Build that target arrangement first.
The target is just the heights sorted in non-decreasing order; compare it position by position with the original.
Sort a copy, then count indices where the original height differs from the sorted height.

edge_inputs.description: single student is always in place
duplicates that stay put must not be counted
one element rotated to the front

stress.description: max length over the full small value range to create many duplicates
stress.note: duplicates ensure equal-but-different-position cases are exercised
